summary: Classified the 10 open PRs in this live inventory shard independently using the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical was selected, and no close/merge/fix actions are permitted for this job. Ready-for-maintainer PRs are routed to maintainer judgment; needs-proof or non-merge-ready PRs are kept open independently. PR #89949 is quarantined with exact-ref route_security for central OpenClaw security handling per deterministic validation.
